Claude Code workspace

Sanitized non-conversation route for graceful degradation.

Code route
Read only

Workspace

export async function verifyFixtureHarness(page) {
  await page.goto('https://claude.ai/code/fixture-workspace');
  return await page.evaluate(() => Boolean(window.__claudeFixture));
}

Files

  • src/App.js
  • popup/popup.js
  • test/e2e/contracts.spec.js
  • test/fixtures/lib/runtime.js

Notes

Conversation-only floating controls must stay hidden here.

The page still runs on the real claude.ai origin for host and route checks.

Workspace ready
